mnemonics.title: WEP Weaknesses
mnemonics.content: Very Insecure Encryption Protocol - Vulnerable IVs, Insufficient length, Easily crackable, Poor implementation

mnemonics.title: Wireless Attack Types
mnemonics.content: Passive Attacks: Eavesdrop Only (EAO) | Active Attacks: Modify, Inject, Disrupt (MID)
